positions.name: iShares Core S&P 500 UCITS ETF (Acc)
positions.thesis: Core broad market exposure to S&P 500. IE-domiciled accumulating structure eliminates 30% WHT on distributions — the structurally optimal S&P 500 vehicle for a Lebanese NRA investor. Held as the portfolio anchor, targeting 36% of NAV. Currently underweight at ~29.35%; a $250 ADD has been recommended for two consecutive weeks (April 11 and April 13) and remains unexecuted — this is the portfolio's highest-priority open action item.
invalidation_conditions: Structural shift away from US equities as the dominant long-term growth engine
A superior WHT-efficient broad market vehicle becomes available (e.g., VUAA on a more liquid exchange)

positions.name: Amazon.com Inc
positions.thesis: Conviction dip buy entered during Liberation Day tariff volatility. Core thesis: AWS dominance (cloud market share leadership), advertising revenue flywheel, and AI infrastructure spend (Bedrock, Trainium) make AMZN a compounding platform business. No dividend means no WHT drag whatsoever. Leading portfolio performer at +11.4% unrealized as of April 10. Thesis remains at full conviction.
invalidation_conditions: AWS loses meaningful cloud market share to Azure or GCP over 2+ consecutive quarters
Regulatory breakup that separates AWS from retail operations
Sustained margin compression across all segments simultaneously

positions.name: SPDR Gold Shares
positions.structure: US-domiciled gold ETF, physical gold backing
positions.thesis: Macro hedge against dollar weakness, geopolitical risk, and inflationary pressure. Gold has no cash flows so no WHT exposure despite US domicile. Held as a portfolio stabilizer — performing as expected (+2.2% unrealized) in the post-Liberation Day tariff uncertainty environment. Central bank gold buying trend intact globally.
invalidation_conditions: Sustained USD strengthening driven by structurally higher real interest rates (not the current environment)
Major reversal in central bank gold buying trend
Risk-off environment fully resolves and portfolio needs redeployment into higher-conviction equities

positions.name: Mastercard Inc
positions.wht_exposure: 30% on dividend. Confirmed April 2026: $0.73 gross dividend, $0.22 withheld (30.1% effective rate). WHT drag ~$1/year at current position size (~$356) — immaterial.
positions.thesis: Conviction dip buy during Liberation Day volatility. Thesis: payments network with near-monopoly duopoly economics (with Visa), asset-light model, global consumer spending exposure, and pricing power insulated from credit cycle risk. Currently -2.8% unrealized — a macro-driven correction, not a thesis failure. Dividend WHT confirmed at 30% as expected for US NRA investor; actual drag is negligible at this position size. Candidate for Tranche 3 deployment ($100 additional) if S&P 500 drops 5-7%.
invalidation_conditions: Disintermediation by real-time payment rails (FedNow, open banking) achieves scale adoption displacing card networks
Regulatory caps on interchange fees implemented in core markets (US, EU)
Sustained global consumer spending contraction lasting more than two quarters

positions.name: NVIDIA Corporation
positions.thesis: AI infrastructure buildout driving unprecedented GPU demand cycle. NVDA holds dominant position in AI training and inference hardware. CUDA ecosystem creates deep switching costs for hyperscalers and research institutions. Positioned as the picks-and-shovels play on the AI capex supercycle. +3.7% unrealized as of April 10. Thesis intact as long as AI infrastructure capex cycle continues.
invalidation_conditions: AMD or custom silicon (Google TPU, Amazon Trainium) takes meaningful, measurable share in AI training workloads over 2+ quarters
AI capex cycle reverses — hyperscalers (MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, META) materially cut infrastructure spend
Export restrictions to China impact revenue materially beyond current guidance (watch BIS rules)

positions.name: ASML Holding NV
positions.structure: Dutch equity — held as NY Reg Shs on NASDAQ (NOT Euronext Amsterdam). Minimal dividend (~1% yield).
positions.wht_exposure: FLAG: Thesis assumes 15% Dutch WHT (treaty rate). However, holding is NY Reg Shs (NASDAQ-listed). Lebanese NRA investors have no US tax treaty, meaning US may withhold at 30% NRA rate rather than 15% Dutch treaty rate. Verify IBKR withholding rate on next dividend payment. If 30% is confirmed, evaluate switching to Euronext Amsterdam listing to eliminate US NRA withholding. At current position size ($257) and ~1% yield, maximum annual WHT cost is under $1 — not material enough for immediate action, but must be monitored.
positions.thesis: Monopoly supplier of EUV lithography machines — no competitor exists at the leading edge. Every advanced chip fab (TSMC, Samsung, Intel) depends entirely on ASML for sub-7nm production. Pricing power, multi-year order backlog, and inelastic demand from the semiconductor industry create an exceptional quality moat. The 15% Dutch WHT (per thesis assumption) is acceptable for a name of this quality. Target: maintain ~6% of NAV. Conviction unchanged. HOWEVER: verify WHT structure — if US is applying 30% WHT on the NY Reg Shs dividend, the Euronext Amsterdam listing (ASML.AS or equivalent) should be considered as an alternative to eliminate US NRA withholding.
invalidation_conditions: China develops a credible domestic EUV alternative (5-10 year horizon risk, not imminent)
Semiconductor capex supercycle ends and fab customers cancel or materially delay orders at scale
Dutch government export restrictions go materially beyond current ASML guidance and impact backlog

positions.name: iShares USD Treasury Bond 0-3 Month UCITS ETF (Acc)
positions.wht_exposure: 0% (portfolio interest exemption via Irish fund structure — US Treasury interest paid to Irish fund exempt from NRA withholding)
positions.thesis: Cash equivalent and capital preservation layer. Replaced SGOV (which carried 30% WHT on distributions) — this is the WHT-efficient alternative for a Lebanese NRA. US Treasury interest paid to an Irish-domiciled fund qualifies for the portfolio interest exemption under IRC Section 871(h), resulting in 0% effective WHT vs 30% on a US-domiciled equivalent. Near-zero duration (0-3M) eliminates interest rate risk. Minor mark-to-market loss (-1.3%) is noise, not signal. Serving dual function: (1) earning T-bill yield on idle cash, (2) Tranche 3 dry powder reserve for equity deployment.
invalidation_conditions: Fed cuts rates aggressively, materially reducing T-bill yield — opportunity cost of holding cash equivalent rises
A better WHT-efficient fixed income vehicle is identified for this investor structure
Portfolio grows large enough that the cash drag from any FI allocation justifies full equity deployment
